title: 3D Door & Trapdoor
description: This makes Door and Trapdoor look 3D in game.
body:
# 3D Door & Trapdoor
Make all Doors and Trapdoors look 3D without any performance imapct and any mod.

## Features:
- Vanilla like
- Enhance the visual
- Don't impact performance

## Try Other 3D Packs
1. [3D Rails](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rails-3d)
2. [3D Bookshelves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-bookshelves)
